---
title: "Exploratory Grand Model (All Three Architectures)"
subtitle: "BBB / BUB / BRB — factor scores from FC + BO + RO, joined by REF"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    df-print: kable
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
  cache: true
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| cache: false
source(here::here("R", "00_paths.R"))
source(here::here("R", "01_packages.R"))
source(here::here("R", "12_lavaan_models.R"))
source(here::here("R", "11_fit_helpers.R"))
source(here::here("R", "20_fit_cfa.R"))
source(here::here("R", "10_datasets.R"))
stopifnot(exists("DATASETS"))

# Strategy: fit each model on its own large sample, extract factor scores,
# then join by REF to get cases present in all three models.
# This avoids the small-n and missing-item problems of DATASETS$cross.

fit_and_score <- function(syntax, data, prefix, label,
                          estimator = "MLR") {
  message("Fitting ", label, " (n=", nrow(data), ", est=", estimator, ")")
  fit <- tryCatch(
    lavaan::cfa(syntax, data = data, estimator = estimator,
                missing = if (estimator == "MLR") "fiml" else "pairwise",
                std.lv = TRUE),
    error = function(e) { message(label, " error: ", e$message); NULL })
  if (is.null(fit) || !lavaan::lavInspect(fit, "converged")) {
    message(label, ": did not converge"); return(NULL)
  }
  fs <- tryCatch(as.data.frame(lavaan::lavPredict(fit)),
                 error = function(e) { message(label, " lavPredict: ", e$message); NULL })
  if (is.null(fs) || ncol(fs) == 0) return(NULL)
  names(fs) <- paste0(prefix, names(fs))
  # Attach REF for joining
  if ("REF" %in% names(data)) fs$REF <- data$REF
  message(label, " OK — ", ncol(fs)-1, " factor scores")
  fs
}
```

# Stage 1 — Extract factor scores per architecture

```{r}
#| label: factor-scores
#| cache: true

fs_fc <- fit_and_score(cfa_fc_higher_order_original(),
                       DATASETS$fc, "FC.", "Faircloth (n=2038)")
fs_bo <- fit_and_score(cfa_bo_original(),
                       DATASETS$bo, "BO.", "Boenigk (n=2038)")
fs_ro <- fit_and_score(cfa_ro_original(),
                       DATASETS$ro, "RO.", "Romero (n=2008)")

# Join by REF — keeps only cases present in all three models
if (!is.null(fs_fc) && !is.null(fs_bo) && !is.null(fs_ro) &&
    all(c("REF") %in% c(names(fs_fc), names(fs_bo), names(fs_ro)))) {
  fs_all <- fs_fc |>
    dplyr::inner_join(fs_bo, by = "REF", suffix = c("","_bo")) |>
    dplyr::inner_join(fs_ro, by = "REF", suffix = c("","_ro")) |>
    dplyr::select(-REF)
} else {
  # Fallback: cbind if no REF (same row order assumed)
  message("No REF column — assuming matched row order")
  parts <- Filter(function(x) !is.null(x) && "REF" %in% names(x) == FALSE,
                  list(fs_fc, fs_bo, fs_ro))
  fs_all <- do.call(cbind, lapply(parts, function(x) x[, names(x) != "REF"]))
}

fs_all <- fs_all[, !duplicated(names(fs_all)), drop = FALSE]
fs_complete <- fs_all[complete.cases(fs_all), ]

message("Joined factor score matrix: ", ncol(fs_all), " columns, ",
        nrow(fs_complete), " complete cases")
print(names(fs_all))
```

# Stage 2 — Latent correlation matrix

```{r}
#| label: latent-correlations
if (nrow(fs_complete) < 10 || ncol(fs_complete) < 2)
  stop("Too few complete cases or columns — check Stage 1 output.")

cor_mat <- cor(fs_complete, method = "pearson")
round(cor_mat, 2) |> as.data.frame() |>
  tibble::rownames_to_column("Latent") |>
  gt::gt() |>
  gt::tab_header(
    "Pairwise correlations among architecture factor scores",
    subtitle = paste0("n = ", nrow(fs_complete), " cases present in all three models")
  ) |>
  gt::fmt_number(where(is.numeric), decimals = 2) |>
  gt::sub_missing(missing_text = "—")
```

# Stage 3 — EFA on factor score matrix

```{r}
#| label: efa-latents
#| cache: true
if (nrow(fs_complete) >= 30 && ncol(fs_complete) >= 3) {
  pa <- psych::fa.parallel(fs_complete, fm = "ml", fa = "fa",
                            n.iter = 50, plot = FALSE)
  n_fa <- max(2, pa$nfact)
  message("Parallel analysis suggests ", n_fa, " factor(s)")

  fa_res <- psych::fa(fs_complete, nfactors = n_fa,
                      rotate = "oblimin", fm = "ml")
  print(psych::fa.sort(fa_res), digits = 2, cut = 0.25)
}
```

# Stage 4 — BBB / BUB / BRB second-order CFA on factor scores

```{r}
#| label: bbb-bub-brb
#| cache: true
block_labels <- list(
  BBB = c("FC.FC_BR","FC.FC_BD","FC.FC_BF","BO.BO_BF","BO.BO_RC",
           "RO.RO_BF","RO.RO_BS"),
  BUB = c("FC.FC_BC","FC.FC_BS",
           "RO.RO_BI","RO.RO_BA","RO.RO_BD","RO.RO_BR"),
  BRB = c("BO.BO_TR","BO.BO_CO",
           "RO.RO_AC","RO.RO_EC","RO.RO_ID")
)

available <- names(fs_complete)
bbb <- intersect(block_labels$BBB, available)
bub <- intersect(block_labels$BUB, available)
brb <- intersect(block_labels$BRB, available)

message("BBB (", length(bbb), "): ", paste(bbb, collapse=", "))
message("BUB (", length(bub), "): ", paste(bub, collapse=", "))
message("BRB (", length(brb), "): ", paste(brb, collapse=", "))

if (any(c(length(bbb), length(bub), length(brb)) < 2))
  stop("At least one block has < 2 indicators — adjust block_labels above")

so_syntax <- paste(
  paste0("BBB =~ ", paste(bbb, collapse=" + ")),
  paste0("BUB =~ ", paste(bub, collapse=" + ")),
  paste0("BRB =~ ", paste(brb, collapse=" + ")),
  sep = "\n"
)
cat(so_syntax, "\n")

fit_so <- tryCatch(
  lavaan::cfa(so_syntax, data = fs_complete,
              estimator = "MLR", std.lv = TRUE),
  error = function(e) { message("SO-CFA error: ", e$message); NULL })

if (!is.null(fit_so) && lavaan::lavInspect(fit_so, "converged")) {
  fm <- lavaan::fitMeasures(fit_so,
          c("chisq","df","cfi","tli","rmsea","srmr","aic","bic"))
  message(sprintf("SO-CFA: CFI=%.3f TLI=%.3f RMSEA=%.3f SRMR=%.3f",
                  fm["cfi"],fm["tli"],fm["rmsea"],fm["srmr"]))

  std <- lavaan::standardizedSolution(fit_so)
  std[std$op == "=~", c("lhs","rhs","est.std","pvalue")] |>
    dplyr::rename(Block=lhs, Latent=rhs, lambda=est.std, p=pvalue) |>
    dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(c(lambda,p), ~round(.x,3))) |>
    gt::gt() |>
    gt::tab_header("BBB / BUB / BRB — second-order loadings on factor scores")

  # Inter-block correlations
  cors <- std[std$op == "~~" & std$lhs != std$rhs &
              std$lhs %in% c("BBB","BUB","BRB"),
              c("lhs","rhs","est.std")]
  if (nrow(cors) > 0) {
    cat("\nInter-block correlations:\n")
    print(cors)
  }
}
```

# Stage 5 — Grand brand equity (third order, eval: false)

```{r}
#| label: grand-be
#| eval: false
grand_syntax <- paste(so_syntax, "\nGBE =~ BBB + BUB + BRB", sep="\n")
fit_grand <- tryCatch(
  lavaan::cfa(grand_syntax, data=fs_complete, estimator="MLR", std.lv=TRUE),
  error = function(e) NULL)
if (!is.null(fit_grand) && lavaan::lavInspect(fit_grand,"converged"))
  print(lavaan::fitMeasures(fit_grand, c("cfi","tli","rmsea","srmr","aic","bic")))
```

# Session info {.unnumbered}
```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
